_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in recognizing the value of survey data.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting data consumer discovery, translating consumer data needs into data product requirements with defined quality, freshness, and access standards.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-005 (OP, cosine: 0.494), AB-S-001 (AB, cosine: 0.488).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.479). Shared vocabulary: [data, skill]. DCWF-only terms [recognizing, survey, value] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, conducting, consumer, defined, discovery, freshness] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.893 (P=0.926, R=0.863). P exceeds R by 0.063 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:55.6%, C:44.2%). No dominant classification for "Skill in recognizing the value of survey data." vs "Skill in conducting data consumer discovery, translating consumer data needs int" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.500 ≈ STS 0.479 (gap 0.022). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.0%. Shared tokens: [data, skill]. DCWF-only: [recognizing, survey, value]. WIDAI-only: [access, conducting, consumer, defined, discovery, freshness].
